text.en: The Transformer replaced recurrent sequence modeling with stacked self-attention and feed-forward blocks. Introduced for machine translation, it became the architecture behind BERT, GPT-style language models, multimodal foundation models, and many modern AI systems.
text.zh: Transformer 用堆叠的自注意力和前馈模块替代循环序列建模。它最初用于机器翻译，后来成为 BERT、GPT 式语言模型、多模态基础模型以及许多现代 AI 系统背后的架构。
